question: List deviations with their CAPA status and batch product name
sql:
WITH DeviationCapa AS (
    SELECT
        d.deviation_id,
        d.deviation_number,
        d.description,
        STRING_AGG(DISTINCT c.status, ', ') AS capa_status
    FROM
        deviation AS d
    LEFT JOIN
        capa AS c ON d.deviation_id = c.deviation_id
    GROUP BY
        d.deviation_id,
        d.deviation_number,
        d.description
),
AllRelatedBatchIDs AS (
    SELECT
        d.deviation_id,
        d.batch_id
    FROM
        deviation AS d
    WHERE
        d.batch_id IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        dab.deviation_id,
        dab.batch_id
    FROM
        deviation_affected_batch AS dab
),
UniqueRelatedBatchIDs AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        arb.deviation_id,
        arb.batch_id
    FROM
        AllRelatedBatchIDs AS arb
),
DeviationProductNames AS (
    SELECT
        urb.deviation_id,
        STRING_AGG(DISTINCT p.name, ', ') AS batch_product_name
    FROM
        UniqueRelatedBatchIDs AS urb
    JOIN
        batch AS b ON urb.batch_id = b.batch_id
    JOIN
        product AS p ON b.product_id = p.product_id
    GROUP BY
        urb.deviation_id
)
SELECT
    dc.deviation_number,
    dc.description,
    dc.capa_status,
    dpn.batch_product_name
FROM
    DeviationCapa AS dc
LEFT JOIN
    DeviationProductNames AS dpn ON dc.deviation_id = dpn.deviation_id
ORDER BY
    dc.deviation_number
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the scrap cost by production line and product?
sql:
SELECT
  pl.name AS production_line_name,
  p.name AS product_name,
  SUM(se.cost_impact) AS total_scrap_cost
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN production_line AS pl
  ON b.line_id = pl.line_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
GROUP BY
  pl.name,
  p.name
ORDER BY
  pl.name,
  p.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show batches with their BOM details and product names
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_id,
  b.batch_number,
  p.name AS product_name,
  bom.batch_size AS bom_batch_size,
  bom.version AS bom_version,
  bom.effective_date AS bom_effective_date,
  rm.name AS material_name,
  bl.quantity_per_batch,
  uom.code AS quantity_uom
FROM batch AS b
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN bill_of_materials AS bom
  ON b.bom_id = bom.bom_id
JOIN bom_line AS bl
  ON bom.bom_id = bl.bom_id
JOIN raw_material AS rm
  ON bl.material_id = rm.material_id
JOIN unit_of_measure AS uom
  ON bl.uom_id = uom.uom_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Show process steps for Paracetamol 500mg with their parameters
sql:
SELECT
  ps.step_number,
  ps.name AS step_name,
  ps.description AS step_description,
  pp.name AS parameter_name,
  pp.min_value,
  pp.max_value,
  pp.target_value,
  pp.is_critical
FROM product AS p
JOIN master_batch_record AS mbr
  ON p.product_id = mbr.product_id
JOIN process_step AS ps
  ON mbr.mbr_id = ps.mbr_id
JOIN process_parameter AS pp
  ON ps.step_id = pp.step_id
WHERE
  p.name = 'Paracetamol 500mg Tablets' AND p.strength = '500mg'
ORDER BY
  ps.step_number,
  pp.name
LIMIT 1000

question: For each supplier, show total quantity of materials received and how many lots were rejected

  SUM(ml.quantity_received) AS total_quantity_received,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN ml.status = 'rejected' THEN ml.lot_id ELSE NULL END) AS rejected_lots_count
FROM supplier AS s
JOIN material_lot AS ml
  ON s.supplier_id = ml.supplier_id
GROUP BY
  s.name
ORDER BY
  s.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show deviations that led to CAPAs with the batch product name, deviation type, and CAPA owner name
sql:
SELECT
  p.name AS batch_product_name,
  dt.name AS deviation_type,
  e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name AS capa_owner_name
FROM deviation AS d
JOIN capa AS c
  ON d.deviation_id = c.deviation_id
JOIN deviation_type AS dt
  ON d.deviation_type_id = dt.deviation_type_id
JOIN deviation_affected_batch AS dab
  ON d.deviation_id = dab.deviation_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON dab.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN employee AS e
  ON c.owner_id = e.employee_id
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the scrap rate by product and site for Q1 2025?
sql:
WITH QuarterlyScrapData AS (
  SELECT
    p.name AS product_name,
    s.name AS site_name,
    SUM(se.quantity) AS total_scrapped_quantity,
    SUM(b.batch_size) AS total_produced_quantity
  FROM scrap_event AS se
  JOIN batch AS b
    ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
  JOIN product AS p
    ON b.product_id = p.product_id
  JOIN site AS s
    ON b.site_id = s.site_id
  WHERE
    se.scrap_date >= '2025-01-01' AND se.scrap_date < '2025-04-01'
  GROUP BY
    p.name,
    s.name
)
SELECT
  qsd.product_name,
  qsd.site_name,
  (qsd.total_scrapped_quantity * 100.0 / qsd.total_produced_quantity) AS scrap_rate_pct
FROM QuarterlyScrapData AS qsd
WHERE
  qsd.total_produced_quantity > 0
ORDER BY
  qsd.product_name,
  qsd.site_name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show equipment that had both downtime and maintenance in 2025 with their type and location
sql:
WITH DowntimeEquipment AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        ed.equipment_id
    FROM
        equipment_downtime ed
    WHERE
        ed.start_time <= '2025-12-31 23:59:59'
        AND (ed.end_time IS NULL OR ed.end_time >= '2025-01-01 00:00:00')
),
MaintenanceEquipment AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        em.equipment_id
    FROM
        equipment_maintenance em
    WHERE
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM em.completed_date) = 2025
),
CommonEquipment AS (
    SELECT equipment_id FROM DowntimeEquipment
    INTERSECT
    SELECT equipment_id FROM MaintenanceEquipment
)
SELECT
    e.name AS equipment_name,
    et.name AS equipment_type,
    e.work_center_id AS work_center_location_id
FROM
    equipment e
JOIN
    equipment_type et ON e.equipment_type_id = et.equipment_type_id
JOIN
    CommonEquipment ce ON e.equipment_id = ce.equipment_id
LIMIT 1000

question: List all raw materials from approved Indian suppliers used in batches with yield below 96%
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  rm.name
FROM raw_material AS rm
JOIN batch_material_usage AS bmu
  ON rm.material_id = bmu.material_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON bmu.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN material_lot AS ml
  ON bmu.lot_id = ml.lot_id
JOIN supplier AS s
  ON ml.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
JOIN country AS c
  ON s.country_id = c.country_id
WHERE
  b.yield_pct < 96.0 AND s.is_approved = TRUE AND c.name = 'India'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show the full deviation-to-CAPA chain: deviation number, type, severity, batch, product, CAPA status, and owner
sql:
SELECT
  d.deviation_number,
  dt.name AS deviation_type,
  dt.severity AS deviation_severity,
  b.batch_number,
  p.name AS product_name,
  c.status AS capa_status,
  e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name AS capa_owner
FROM deviation AS d
JOIN deviation_type AS dt
  ON d.deviation_type_id = dt.deviation_type_id
LEFT JOIN deviation_affected_batch AS dab
  ON d.deviation_id = dab.deviation_id
LEFT JOIN batch AS b
  ON dab.batch_id = b.batch_id
LEFT JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
LEFT JOIN capa AS c
  ON d.deviation_id = c.deviation_id
LEFT JOIN employee AS e
  ON c.owner_id = e.employee_id
LIMIT 1000

question: What is the total scrap cost by scrap reason category and production line name?
sql:
SELECT
  sr.category,
  pl.name AS production_line_name,
  SUM(se.cost_impact) AS total_scrap_cost
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN production_line AS pl
  ON b.line_id = pl.line_id
GROUP BY
  sr.category,
  pl.name
ORDER BY
  sr.category,
  pl.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show batches where in-process checks failed with the test type, batch number, and product
sql:
SELECT
  tt.name AS test_type,
  b.batch_number,
  p.name AS product
FROM in_process_check AS ipc
JOIN batch AS b
  ON ipc.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN test_type AS tt
  ON ipc.test_type_id = tt.test_type_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE
  ipc.passed = FALSE
LIMIT 1000

question: For each site, show number of batches, number of scrap events, and total scrap cost in 2025
sql:
WITH RelevantBatches AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        b.batch_id,
        b.site_id
    FROM
        batch b
    WHERE
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM b.start_date) = 2025
        OR EXTRACT(YEAR FROM b.end_date) = 2025
        OR EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM scrap_event se
            WHERE se.batch_id = b.batch_id
              AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM se.scrap_date) = 2025
        )
),
SiteMetrics AS (
    SELECT
        s.site_id,
        s.name AS site_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT rb.batch_id) AS number_of_batches,
        COUNT(se.scrap_id) AS number_of_scrap_events,
        SUM(se.cost_impact) AS total_scrap_cost
    FROM
        site s
    LEFT JOIN
        RelevantBatches rb ON s.site_id = rb.site_id
    LEFT JOIN
        scrap_event se ON rb.batch_id = se.batch_id AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM se.scrap_date) = 2025
    GROUP BY
        s.site_id,
        s.name
)
SELECT
    sm.site_name,
    COALESCE(sm.number_of_batches, 0) AS number_of_batches,
    COALESCE(sm.number_of_scrap_events, 0) AS number_of_scrap_events,
    COALESCE(sm.total_scrap_cost, 0.00) AS total_scrap_cost
FROM
    SiteMetrics sm
ORDER BY
    sm.site_name
LIMIT 1000

question: Which production lines had the worst OEE and highest scrap rate?
sql:
WITH LineOEE AS (
    SELECT
        pl.line_id,
        pl.name AS line_name,
        AVG(ore.oee_pct) AS avg_oee_pct
    FROM
        production_line AS pl
    JOIN
        oee_record AS ore
        ON pl.line_id = ore.line_id
    GROUP BY
        pl.line_id,
        pl.name
),
LineScrapRate AS (
    SELECT
        pl.line_id,
        pl.name AS line_name,
        SUM(se.quantity) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(b.batch_size), 0) AS scrap_rate_pct
    FROM
        production_line AS pl
    JOIN
        batch AS b
        ON pl.line_id = b.line_id
    JOIN
        scrap_event AS se
        ON b.batch_id = se.batch_id
    GROUP BY
        pl.line_id,
        pl.name
)
SELECT
    lo.line_name,
    lo.avg_oee_pct,
    lsr.scrap_rate_pct
FROM
    LineOEE AS lo
JOIN
    LineScrapRate AS lsr
    ON lo.line_id = lsr.line_id
ORDER BY
    lo.avg_oee_pct ASC,
    lsr.scrap_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all material lots used in batch BN-2025-013 with material name, supplier, and lot status
sql:
SELECT
  rm.name AS material_name,
  s.name AS supplier_name,
  ml.status AS lot_status
FROM batch AS b
JOIN batch_material_usage AS bmu
  ON b.batch_id = bmu.batch_id
JOIN material_lot AS ml
  ON bmu.lot_id = ml.lot_id
JOIN raw_material AS rm
  ON ml.material_id = rm.material_id
JOIN supplier AS s
  ON ml.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
WHERE
  b.batch_number = 'BN-2025-013'
LIMIT 1000

question: List open CAPAs with their deviation details, affected batch, product, and due date
sql:
SELECT
  c.capa_number,
  c.description AS capa_description,
  c.due_date,
  d.deviation_number,
  d.description AS deviation_description,
  dab.impact_description AS affected_batch_impact,
  b.batch_number,
  p.name AS product_name
FROM capa AS c
JOIN deviation AS d
  ON c.deviation_id = d.deviation_id
JOIN deviation_affected_batch AS dab
  ON d.deviation_id = dab.deviation_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON dab.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE
  c.status = 'open'
LIMIT 1000

question: Show the top 5 scrap reasons by total cost with their category
sql:
WITH ScrapReasonCosts AS (
  SELECT
    sr.name AS scrap_reason_name,
    sr.category AS scrap_reason_category,
    SUM(se.cost_impact) AS total_cost
  FROM scrap_event AS se
  JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
    ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
  GROUP BY
    sr.name,
    sr.category
)
SELECT
  src.scrap_reason_name,
  src.scrap_reason_category,
  src.total_cost
FROM ScrapReasonCosts AS src
ORDER BY
  src.total_cost DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: For each product, show total batches produced, batches rejected, and average yield
sql:
SELECT
  p.name,
  COUNT(b.batch_id) AS total_batches_produced,
  COUNT(b.batch_id) FILTER (
    WHERE
      b.status = 'rejected'
  ) AS batches_rejected,
  AVG(b.yield_pct) AS average_yield
FROM product AS p
JOIN batch AS b
  ON p.product_id = b.product_id
GROUP BY
  p.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show sales orders with customer name, product name, and shipment status
sql:
SELECT
  so.order_number,
  c.name AS customer_name,
  p.name AS product_name,
  s.status AS shipment_status
FROM sales_order AS so
JOIN customer AS c
  ON so.customer_id = c.customer_id
JOIN sales_order_line AS sol
  ON so.order_id = sol.order_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON sol.product_id = p.product_id
LEFT JOIN shipment AS s
  ON so.order_id = s.order_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Which equipment had calibration failures and what batches were running at the time?
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
    e.name AS equipment_name,
    e.serial_number,
    b.batch_number,
    cr.calibration_date AS failure_calibration_date
FROM
    calibration_record cr
JOIN
    equipment e ON cr.equipment_id = e.equipment_id
JOIN
    batch_step_execution bse ON e.equipment_id = bse.equipment_id
JOIN
    batch b ON bse.batch_id = b.batch_id
WHERE
    cr.passed = FALSE
    AND bse.start_time <= cr.calibration_date
    AND bse.end_time >= cr.calibration_date
ORDER BY
    e.name,
    b.batch_number,
    cr.calibration_date
LIMIT 1000

question: Show scrap events caused by operator error with the operator name, batch, and product
sql:
SELECT
  e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name AS operator_name,
  b.batch_number,
  p.name AS product_name
FROM scrap_event AS se
JOIN scrap_reason AS sr
  ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
JOIN employee AS e
  ON se.reported_by = e.employee_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE
  sr.name = 'Operator Error'
LIMIT 1000

question: Compare yield trends between US and India sites by month in 2025
sql:
WITH MonthlyYield AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('month', ya.period_start) AS yield_month,
        c.code AS country_code,
        AVG(ya.avg_yield_pct) AS monthly_avg_yield
    FROM
        yield_analysis ya
    JOIN
        site s ON ya.site_id = s.site_id
    JOIN
        country c ON s.country_id = c.country_id
    WHERE
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ya.period_start) = 2025
        AND c.code IN ('US', 'IN')
    GROUP BY
        DATE_TRUNC('month', ya.period_start),
        c.code
)
SELECT
    TO_CHAR(my.yield_month, 'YYYY-MM') AS month,
    MAX(CASE WHEN my.country_code = 'US' THEN my.monthly_avg_yield ELSE NULL END) AS us_avg_yield_pct,
    MAX(CASE WHEN my.country_code = 'IN' THEN my.monthly_avg_yield ELSE NULL END) AS india_avg_yield_pct
FROM
    MonthlyYield my
GROUP BY
    my.yield_month
ORDER BY
    my.yield_month
LIMIT 1000

question: Show the complete batch cost breakdown for all rejected batches with product names
sql:
SELECT
  b.batch_number,
  p.name AS product_name,
  b.status AS batch_status,
  bc.cost_type,
  bc.amount,
  c.code AS currency_code,
  cc.name AS cost_center_name,
  bc.recorded_date,
  bc.notes
FROM batch_cost AS bc
JOIN batch AS b
  ON bc.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN product AS p
  ON b.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN currency AS c
  ON bc.currency_id = c.currency_id
JOIN cost_center AS cc
  ON bc.cost_center_id = cc.cost_center_id
WHERE
  b.status = 'rejected'
ORDER BY
  b.batch_number,
  bc.recorded_date,
  bc.cost_type
LIMIT 1000

question: For each supplier, show materials supplied, lots rejected, batches affected by their material quality issues, and any open CAPAs
sql:
WITH SupplierMaterials AS (
    SELECT
        s.supplier_id,
        s.name AS supplier_name,
        STRING_AGG(DISTINCT rm.name, ', ') AS materials_supplied
    FROM
        supplier s
    LEFT JOIN
        supplier_material sm ON s.supplier_id = sm.supplier_id
    LEFT JOIN
        raw_material rm ON sm.material_id = rm.material_id
    GROUP BY
        s.supplier_id, s.name
),
RejectedLots AS (
    SELECT
        ml.supplier_id,
        COUNT(ml.lot_id) AS lots_rejected
    FROM
        material_lot ml
    WHERE
        ml.status = 'rejected'
    GROUP BY
        ml.supplier_id
),
AffectedBatchesByDeviation AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        COALESCE(dab.batch_id, d.batch_id) AS batch_id,
        ml.supplier_id
    FROM
        deviation d
    LEFT JOIN
        deviation_affected_batch dab ON d.deviation_id = dab.deviation_id
    JOIN
        batch_material_usage bmu ON COALESCE(dab.batch_id, d.batch_id) = bmu.batch_id
    JOIN
        material_lot ml ON bmu.lot_id = ml.lot_id
    WHERE
        d.root_cause = 'Supplier IndoPharma - degradation during transit'
        OR d.impact_assessment = 'Batch BN-2025-013 rejected'
),
AffectedBatchesByOOS AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        oos.batch_id,
        ml.supplier_id
    FROM
        qc_oos_event oos
    JOIN
        batch_material_usage bmu ON oos.batch_id = bmu.batch_id
    JOIN
        material_lot ml ON bmu.lot_id = ml.lot_id
    WHERE
        oos.root_cause = 'Raw material lot LOT-2025-015 degraded API'
        OR oos.impact_assessment = 'Batch BN-2025-013 rejected'
),
AllAffectedBatches AS (
    SELECT supplier_id, batch_id FROM AffectedBatchesByDeviation
    UNION
    SELECT supplier_id, batch_id FROM AffectedBatchesByOOS
),
AffectedBatchesCount AS (
    SELECT
        supplier_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT batch_id) AS batches_affected
    FROM
        AllAffectedBatches
    GROUP BY
        supplier_id
),
OpenCAPAsByDeviation AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        ml.supplier_id,
        c.capa_id
    FROM
        capa c
    JOIN
        deviation d ON c.deviation_id = d.deviation_id
    LEFT JOIN
        deviation_affected_batch dab ON d.deviation_id = dab.deviation_id
    JOIN
        batch_material_usage bmu ON COALESCE(dab.batch_id, d.batch_id) = bmu.batch_id
    JOIN
        material_lot ml ON bmu.lot_id = ml.lot_id
    WHERE
        c.status = 'open'
        AND (
            c.description = 'Supplier CAPA for IndoPharma - material quality failure'
            OR d.root_cause = 'Supplier IndoPharma - degradation during transit'
        )
),
OpenCAPAsByOOS AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        ml.supplier_id,
        c.capa_id
    FROM
        capa c
    JOIN
        qc_oos_event oos ON c.oos_id = oos.oos_id
    JOIN
        batch_material_usage bmu ON oos.batch_id = bmu.batch_id
    JOIN
        material_lot ml ON bmu.lot_id = ml.lot_id
    WHERE
        c.status = 'open'
        AND (
            c.description = 'Supplier CAPA for IndoPharma - material quality failure'
            OR oos.root_cause = 'Raw material lot LOT-2025-015 degraded API'
        )
),
AllOpenSupplierCAPAs AS (
    SELECT supplier_id, capa_id FROM OpenCAPAsByDeviation
    UNION
    SELECT supplier_id, capa_id FROM OpenCAPAsByOOS
),
OpenSupplierCAPAsCount AS (
    SELECT
        supplier_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT capa_id) AS open_capas
    FROM
        AllOpenSupplierCAPAs
    GROUP BY
        supplier_id
)
SELECT
    s.name AS supplier_name,
    COALESCE(sm.materials_supplied, 'No materials supplied') AS materials_supplied,
    COALESCE(rl.lots_rejected, 0) AS lots_rejected,
    COALESCE(abc.batches_affected, 0) AS batches_affected_by_material_issues,
    COALESCE(osc.open_capas, 0) AS open_capas
FROM
    supplier s
LEFT JOIN
    SupplierMaterials sm ON s.supplier_id = sm.supplier_id
LEFT JOIN
    RejectedLots rl ON s.supplier_id = rl.supplier_id
LEFT JOIN
    AffectedBatchesCount abc ON s.supplier_id = abc.supplier_id
LEFT JOIN
    OpenSupplierCAPAsCount osc ON s.supplier_id = osc.supplier_id
ORDER BY
    s.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show the full traceability for batch BN-2025-001: materials used, QC results, yield at each stage, and total cost
sql:
WITH BatchCore AS (
    SELECT
        b.batch_id,
        b.batch_number,
        b.start_date,
        b.end_date,
        b.batch_size,
        b.yield_quantity AS final_yield_quantity,
        b.yield_pct AS final_yield_pct,
        b.status AS batch_status,
        po.order_number,
        mbr.document_number AS mbr_document_number,
        supervisor_emp.first_name || ' ' || supervisor_emp.last_name AS supervisor_name,
        released_by_emp.first_name || ' ' || released_by_emp.last_name AS released_by_name
    FROM
        batch AS b
    LEFT JOIN
        production_order AS po ON b.order_id = po.order_id
    LEFT JOIN
        master_batch_record AS mbr ON b.bom_id = mbr.bom_id AND b.product_id = mbr.product_id
    LEFT JOIN
        employee AS supervisor_emp ON b.supervisor_id = supervisor_emp.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN
        employee AS released_by_emp ON b.released_by = released_by_emp.employee_id
    WHERE
        b.batch_number = 'BN-2025-001'
),
MaterialDetails AS (
    SELECT
        bmu.batch_id,
        ps.name AS process_step_name,
        rm.name AS material_name,
        ml.lot_number,
        bmu.actual_quantity,
        uom.code AS material_uom,
        bmu.dispensed_at,
        dispensed_by_emp.first_name || ' ' || dispensed_by_emp.last_name AS dispensed_by,
        verified_by_emp.first_name || ' ' || verified_by_emp.last_name AS verified_by
    FROM
        batch_material_usage AS bmu
    JOIN
        raw_material AS rm ON bmu.material_id = rm.material_id
    JOIN
        material_lot AS ml ON bmu.lot_id = ml.lot_id
    JOIN
        unit_of_measure AS uom ON bmu.uom_id = uom.uom_id
    LEFT JOIN
        process_step AS ps ON bmu.step_id = ps.step_id
    LEFT JOIN
        employee AS dispensed_by_emp ON bmu.dispensed_by = dispensed_by_emp.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN
        employee AS verified_by_emp ON bmu.verified_by = verified_by_emp.employee_id
    WHERE
        bmu.batch_id IN (SELECT batch_id FROM BatchCore)
),
YieldDetails AS (
    SELECT
        byd.batch_id,
        byd.stage,
        byd.measured_at,
        byd.input_quantity,
        byd.output_quantity,
        byd.waste_quantity,
        byd.yield_pct AS stage_yield_pct,
        measured_by_emp.first_name || ' ' || measured_by_emp.last_name AS measured_by
    FROM
        batch_yield AS byd
    LEFT JOIN
        employee AS measured_by_emp ON byd.measured_by = measured_by_emp.employee_id
    WHERE
        byd.batch_id IN (SELECT batch_id FROM BatchCore)
),
QcDetails AS (
    SELECT
        bse.batch_id,
        ps.name AS process_step_name,
        bse.start_time AS step_start_time,
        bse.end_time AS step_end_time,
        bse.status AS step_status,
        pp.name AS parameter_name,
        bpr.reading_time,
        bpr.actual_value,
        uom.code AS parameter_uom,
        pp.target_value,
        pp.min_value,
        pp.max_value,
        bpr.within_spec
    FROM
        batch_step_execution AS bse
    JOIN
        batch_parameter_reading AS bpr ON bse.execution_id = bpr.execution_id
    JOIN
        process_parameter AS pp ON bpr.parameter_id = pp.parameter_id
    LEFT JOIN
        unit_of_measure AS uom ON pp.uom_id = uom.uom_id
    LEFT JOIN
        process_step AS ps ON bse.step_id = ps.step_id
    WHERE
        bse.batch_id IN (SELECT batch_id FROM BatchCore)
),
DeviationDetails AS (
    SELECT
        d.batch_id,
        d.deviation_number,
        d.reported_date,
        d.description AS deviation_description,
        d.impact_assessment,
        d.status AS deviation_status,
        dab.impact_description AS affected_batch_impact
    FROM
        deviation AS d
    LEFT JOIN
        deviation_affected_batch AS dab ON d.deviation_id = dab.deviation_id AND d.batch_id = dab.batch_id
    WHERE
        d.batch_id IN (SELECT batch_id FROM BatchCore)
),
BatchCostsBreakdown AS (
    SELECT
        bc.batch_id,
        bc.cost_type,
        bc.amount,
        curr.code AS currency_code,
        cc.name AS cost_center_name,
        bc.recorded_date
    FROM
        batch_cost AS bc
    LEFT JOIN
        currency AS curr ON bc.currency_id = curr.currency_id
    LEFT JOIN
        cost_center AS cc ON bc.cost_center_id = cc.cost_center_id
    WHERE
        bc.batch_id IN (SELECT batch_id FROM BatchCore)
),
TotalBatchCost AS (
    SELECT
        bc.batch_id,
        SUM(bc.amount) AS total_cost_amount
    FROM
        batch_cost AS bc
    WHERE
        bc.batch_id IN (SELECT batch_id FROM BatchCore)
    GROUP BY
        bc.batch_id
)
SELECT
    bc.batch_number,
    bc.start_date,
    bc.end_date,
    bc.batch_size,
    bc.final_yield_quantity,
    bc.final_yield_pct,
    bc.batch_status,
    bc.order_number,
    bc.mbr_document_number,
    bc.supervisor_name,
    bc.released_by_name,
    tbc.total_cost_amount,
    -- Materials Used
    md.process_step_name AS material_usage_step,
    md.material_name,
    md.lot_number,
    md.actual_quantity AS material_actual_quantity,
    md.material_uom,
    md.dispensed_at,
    md.dispensed_by,
    md.verified_by,
    -- QC Results (Parameters)
    qd.process_step_name AS qc_step_name,
    qd.step_start_time,
    qd.step_end_time,
    qd.step_status,
    qd.parameter_name,
    qd.reading_time,
    qd.actual_value AS parameter_actual_value,
    qd.parameter_uom,
    qd.target_value AS parameter_target_value,
    qd.min_value AS parameter_min_value,
    qd.max_value AS parameter_max_value,
    qd.within_spec,
    -- Yield at Each Stage
    yd.stage AS yield_stage,
    yd.measured_at AS yield_measured_at,
    yd.input_quantity AS yield_input_quantity,
    yd.output_quantity AS yield_output_quantity,
    yd.waste_quantity AS yield_waste_quantity,
    yd.stage_yield_pct,
    yd.measured_by AS yield_measured_by,
    -- Deviations (part of QC/Traceability)
    dd.deviation_number,
    dd.reported_date AS deviation_reported_date,
    dd.deviation_description,
    dd.impact_assessment AS deviation_impact_assessment,
    dd.deviation_status,
    dd.affected_batch_impact,
    -- Cost Breakdown
    bco.cost_type,
    bco.amount AS cost_amount,
    bco.currency_code,
    bco.cost_center_name,
    bco.recorded_date AS cost_recorded_date
FROM
    BatchCore AS bc
LEFT JOIN
    TotalBatchCost AS tbc ON bc.batch_id = tbc.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    MaterialDetails AS md ON bc.batch_id = md.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    YieldDetails AS yd ON bc.batch_id = yd.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    QcDetails AS qd ON bc.batch_id = qd.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    DeviationDetails AS dd ON bc.batch_id = dd.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    BatchCostsBreakdown AS bco ON bc.batch_id = bco.batch_id
ORDER BY
    bc.batch_number,
    md.dispensed_at,
    yd.measured_at,
    qd.reading_time,
    dd.reported_date,
    bco.recorded_date
LIMIT 1000

question: Which production areas had environmental excursions that coincided with batch scrap events?
sql:
WITH EnvironmentalExcursions AS (
  SELECT
    pa.area_id,
    pa.name AS production_area_name,
    DATE_TRUNC('day', em.monitoring_date) AS excursion_day
  FROM
    environmental_monitoring AS em
  JOIN
    production_area AS pa
      ON em.area_id = pa.area_id
  WHERE
    em.within_spec = FALSE
), BatchScrapEvents AS (
  SELECT
    pa.area_id,
    pa.name AS production_area_name,
    DATE_TRUNC('day', se.scrap_date) AS scrap_day
  FROM
    scrap_event AS se
  JOIN
    batch AS b
      ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
  JOIN
    production_line AS pl
      ON b.line_id = pl.line_id
  JOIN
    production_area AS pa
      ON pl.area_id = pa.area_id
)
SELECT DISTINCT
  ee.production_area_name
FROM
  EnvironmentalExcursions AS ee
JOIN
  BatchScrapEvents AS bse
    ON ee.area_id = bse.area_id
    AND ee.excursion_day = bse.scrap_day
LIMIT 1000

question: Show a supplier quality scorecard: lots received, lots rejected, linked batch failures, and total scrap cost caused by their materials
sql:
WITH SupplierLotMetrics AS (
    SELECT
        s.supplier_id,
        s.name AS supplier_name,
        COUNT(ml.lot_id) AS lots_received,
        COUNT(ml.lot_id) FILTER (WHERE ml.status = 'rejected') AS lots_rejected
    FROM
        supplier s
    LEFT JOIN
        material_lot ml ON s.supplier_id = ml.supplier_id
    GROUP BY
        s.supplier_id,
        s.name
),
SupplierBatchFailures AS (
    SELECT
        s.supplier_id,
        s.name AS supplier_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b.batch_id) AS linked_batch_failures
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        material_lot ml ON s.supplier_id = ml.supplier_id
    JOIN
        material_lot_transaction mlt ON ml.lot_id = mlt.lot_id
    JOIN
        batch b ON mlt.batch_id = b.batch_id
    WHERE
        b.status = 'rejected'
    GROUP BY
        s.supplier_id,
        s.name
),
SupplierScrapCost AS (
    SELECT
        s.supplier_id,
        s.name AS supplier_name,
        SUM(smd.total_cost) AS total_scrap_cost_caused_by_materials
    FROM
        supplier s
    JOIN
        material_lot ml ON s.supplier_id = ml.supplier_id
    JOIN
        scrap_material_detail smd ON ml.lot_id = smd.lot_id
    GROUP BY
        s.supplier_id,
        s.name
)
SELECT
    slm.supplier_name,
    COALESCE(slm.lots_received, 0) AS lots_received,
    COALESCE(slm.lots_rejected, 0) AS lots_rejected,
    COALESCE(sbf.linked_batch_failures, 0) AS linked_batch_failures,
    COALESCE(ssc.total_scrap_cost_caused_by_materials, 0.0) AS total_scrap_cost_caused_by_materials
FROM
    SupplierLotMetrics slm
FULL OUTER JOIN
    SupplierBatchFailures sbf ON slm.supplier_id = sbf.supplier_id
FULL OUTER JOIN
    SupplierScrapCost ssc ON slm.supplier_id = ssc.supplier_id
ORDER BY
    slm.supplier_name
LIMIT 1000

question: For each product, show the batch with the worst yield, its scrap reasons, deviations raised, and total cost impact
sql:
WITH RankedBatches AS (
    SELECT
        b.product_id,
        b.batch_id,
        b.batch_number,
        b.yield_pct,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY b.product_id ORDER BY b.yield_pct ASC) AS rn
    FROM
        batch AS b
),
BatchScrapReasons AS (
    SELECT
        se.batch_id,
        STRING_AGG(sr.name, ', ') AS scrap_reasons
    FROM
        scrap_event AS se
    JOIN
        scrap_reason AS sr
        ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
    GROUP BY
        se.batch_id
),
BatchDeviations AS (
    SELECT
        d.batch_id,
        STRING_AGG(d.description, ', ') AS deviation_descriptions
    FROM
        deviation AS d
    GROUP BY
        d.batch_id
),
BatchTotalCost AS (
    SELECT
        bc.batch_id,
        SUM(bc.amount) AS total_cost_impact
    FROM
        batch_cost AS bc
    GROUP BY
        bc.batch_id
)
SELECT
    p.name AS product_name,
    rb.batch_number,
    rb.yield_pct AS worst_yield_percentage,
    COALESCE(bsr.scrap_reasons, 'No scrap reasons recorded') AS scrap_reasons,
    COALESCE(bd.deviation_descriptions, 'No deviations recorded') AS deviations_raised,
    COALESCE(btc.total_cost_impact, 0.00) AS total_cost_impact
FROM
    RankedBatches AS rb
JOIN
    product AS p
    ON rb.product_id = p.product_id
LEFT JOIN
    BatchScrapReasons AS bsr
    ON rb.batch_id = bsr.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    BatchDeviations AS bd
    ON rb.batch_id = bd.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    BatchTotalCost AS btc
    ON rb.batch_id = btc.batch_id
WHERE
    rb.rn = 1
ORDER BY
    p.name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show all employees involved in rejected batches: supervisors, operators who reported scrap, and QC analysts who found OOS results
sql:
WITH RejectedBatches AS (
    SELECT
        b.batch_id
    FROM
        batch AS b
    WHERE
        b.status = 'rejected'
),
Supervisors AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        e.employee_id,
        e.first_name,
        e.last_name
    FROM
        RejectedBatches AS rb
    JOIN
        batch AS b ON rb.batch_id = b.batch_id
    JOIN
        employee AS e ON b.supervisor_id = e.employee_id
    WHERE
        e.is_active = true
),
OperatorsReportingScrap AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        e.employee_id,
        e.first_name,
        e.last_name
    FROM
        RejectedBatches AS rb
    JOIN
        scrap_event AS se ON rb.batch_id = se.batch_id
    JOIN
        employee AS e ON se.reported_by = e.employee_id
    WHERE
        e.is_active = true
),
QCAnalystsFindingOOS AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        e.employee_id,
        e.first_name,
        e.last_name
    FROM
        RejectedBatches AS rb
    JOIN
        qc_oos_event AS qoe ON rb.batch_id = qoe.batch_id
    JOIN
        qc_test_result AS qtr ON qoe.result_id = qtr.result_id
    JOIN
        employee AS e ON qtr.tested_by = e.employee_id
    WHERE
        e.is_active = true
)
SELECT
    employee_id,
    first_name,
    last_name
FROM
    Supervisors
UNION DISTINCT
SELECT
    employee_id,
    first_name,
    last_name
FROM
    OperatorsReportingScrap
UNION DISTINCT
SELECT
    employee_id,
    first_name,
    last_name
FROM
    QCAnalystsFindingOOS
ORDER BY
    last_name,
    first_name
LIMIT 1000

question: Compare equipment OEE against scrap rate for each production line, including the most common scrap reason
sql:
WITH LineOEE AS (
    SELECT
        pl.line_id,
        pl.name AS line_name,
        AVG(ore.oee_pct) AS overall_equipment_effectiveness_oee
    FROM
        oee_record AS ore
    JOIN
        production_line AS pl ON ore.line_id = pl.line_id
    GROUP BY
        pl.line_id,
        pl.name
), LineScrapRate AS (
    SELECT
        pl.line_id,
        pl.name AS line_name,
        SUM(se.quantity) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(b.batch_size), 0) AS scrap_rate_percentage
    FROM
        scrap_event AS se
    JOIN
        batch AS b ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
    JOIN
        production_line AS pl ON b.line_id = pl.line_id
    GROUP BY
        pl.line_id,
        pl.name
), LineMostCommonScrapReason AS (
    WITH ScrapReasonCounts AS (
        SELECT
            pl.line_id,
            sr.name AS scrap_reason_name,
            COUNT(se.scrap_id) AS reason_count,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pl.line_id ORDER BY COUNT(se.scrap_id) DESC) AS rn
        FROM
            scrap_event AS se
        JOIN
            batch AS b ON se.batch_id = b.batch_id
        JOIN
            production_line AS pl ON b.line_id = pl.line_id
        JOIN
            scrap_reason AS sr ON se.reason_id = sr.reason_id
        GROUP BY
            pl.line_id,
            sr.name
    )
    SELECT
        line_id,
        scrap_reason_name
    FROM
        ScrapReasonCounts
    WHERE
        rn = 1
)
SELECT
    lo.line_name,
    lo.overall_equipment_effectiveness_oee,
    lsr.scrap_rate_percentage,
    lmcsr.scrap_reason_name AS most_common_scrap_reason
FROM
    LineOEE AS lo
LEFT JOIN
    LineScrapRate AS lsr ON lo.line_id = lsr.line_id
LEFT JOIN
    LineMostCommonScrapReason AS lmcsr ON lo.line_id = lmcsr.line_id
ORDER BY
    lo.line_name
LIMIT 1000

question: Show the complete deviation history for Tablet Line 1: deviation type, severity, batch affected, root cause, CAPA status, and days to closure
sql:
SELECT
  dt.name AS deviation_type,
  dt.severity AS severity,
  b.batch_number AS batch_affected,
  d.root_cause AS root_cause,
  c.status AS capa_status,
  EXTRACT(DAY FROM (d.closed_date - d.reported_date)) AS days_to_closure
FROM deviation AS d
JOIN deviation_type AS dt
  ON d.deviation_type_id = dt.deviation_type_id
JOIN deviation_affected_batch AS dab
  ON d.deviation_id = dab.deviation_id
JOIN batch AS b
  ON dab.batch_id = b.batch_id
JOIN production_line AS pl
  ON b.line_id = pl.line_id
LEFT JOIN capa AS c
  ON d.deviation_id = c.deviation_id
WHERE
  pl.name = 'Tablet Line 1'
ORDER BY
  d.reported_date
LIMIT 1000

question: For batch BN-2025-013, show the complete failure chain: what went wrong at each process step, which materials were involved, which deviations were raised, and what the total financial impact was
sql:
WITH BatchInfo AS (
    SELECT
        b.batch_id,
        b.batch_number,
        b.start_date,
        b.end_date,
        b.status AS batch_status
    FROM batch b
    WHERE b.batch_number = 'BN-2025-013'
),
ProcessStepsDetails AS (
    SELECT
        pse.batch_id,
        ps.step_id,
        ps.step_number,
        ps.name AS step_name,
        ps.description AS step_description,
        pse.start_time AS step_start_time,
        pse.end_time AS step_end_time,
        pse.status AS step_execution_status,
        e.name AS equipment_name,
        pse.equipment_id,
        STRING_AGG(DISTINCT rm.name || ' (Lot: ' || ml.lot_number || ', Qty: ' || bmu.actual_quantity || ' ' || u.code || ')', '; ') AS materials_involved
    FROM BatchInfo bi
    JOIN batch_step_execution pse ON bi.batch_id = pse.batch_id
    JOIN process_step ps ON pse.step_id = ps.step_id
    LEFT JOIN equipment e ON pse.equipment_id = e.equipment_id
    LEFT JOIN batch_material_usage bmu ON bi.batch_id = bmu.batch_id AND ps.step_id = bmu.step_id
    LEFT JOIN raw_material rm ON bmu.material_id = rm.material_id
    LEFT JOIN material_lot ml ON bmu.lot_id = ml.lot_id
    LEFT JOIN unit_of_measure u ON bmu.uom_id = u.uom_id
    GROUP BY
        pse.batch_id, ps.step_id, ps.step_number, ps.name, ps.description, pse.start_time, pse.end_time, pse.status, e.name, pse.equipment_id
    ORDER BY
        ps.step_number
),
DeviationsSummary AS (
    SELECT
        bi.batch_id,
        d.equipment_id,
        STRING_AGG(
            d.deviation_number || ' (' || dt.name || ' - ' || pl.name || '): ' || d.description ||
            COALESCE(' Root Cause: ' || d.root_cause, '') ||
            COALESCE(' Immediate Action: ' || d.immediate_action, '') ||
            COALESCE(' Impact: ' || d.impact_assessment, '') ||
            COALESCE(' Affected Batch Impact: ' || dab.impact_description, ''),
            E'\n--- '
        ORDER BY d.reported_date
        ) AS deviations_details
    FROM deviation d
    JOIN deviation_type dt ON d.deviation_type_id = dt.deviation_type_id
    JOIN priority_level pl ON d.priority_id = pl.priority_id
    LEFT JOIN deviation_affected_batch dab ON d.deviation_id = dab.deviation_id
    JOIN BatchInfo bi ON d.batch_id = bi.batch_id OR dab.batch_id = bi.batch_id
    GROUP BY bi.batch_id, d.equipment_id
),
OOSSummary AS (
    SELECT
        bi.batch_id,
        STRING_AGG(
            'OOS Event: ' || oos.oos_date || ' - ' || oos.description ||
            COALESCE(' Root Cause: ' || oos.root_cause, '') ||
            COALESCE(' Impact: ' || oos.impact_assessment, ''),
            E'\n--- '
        ORDER BY oos.oos_date
        ) AS oos_events_details
    FROM qc_oos_event oos
    JOIN BatchInfo bi ON oos.batch_id = bi.batch_id
    GROUP BY bi.batch_id
),
FinancialImpact AS (
    SELECT
        bi.batch_id,
        SUM(COALESCE(bc.amount * COALESCE(c.exchange_rate_to_usd, 1), 0)) AS total_batch_costs,
        SUM(COALESCE(se.cost_impact, 0)) AS total_scrap_event_cost_impact
    FROM BatchInfo bi
    LEFT JOIN batch_cost bc ON bi.batch_id = bc.batch_id
    LEFT JOIN currency c ON bc.currency_id = c.currency_id
    LEFT JOIN scrap_event se ON bi.batch_id = se.batch_id
    GROUP BY bi.batch_id
)
SELECT
    bi.batch_number,
    bi.batch_status,
    psd.step_number,
    psd.step_name,
    psd.step_description,
    psd.step_start_time,
    psd.step_end_time,
    psd.step_execution_status,
    psd.equipment_name,
    COALESCE(psd.materials_involved, 'No materials involved in this step.') AS materials_involved,
    COALESCE(ds_step.deviations_details, 'No deviations reported for this step/equipment.') AS step_deviations,
    COALESCE(ds_batch.deviations_details, 'No general batch deviations reported.') AS general_batch_deviations,
    COALESCE(oss.oos_events_details, 'No OOS events reported.') AS oos_events,
    fi.total_batch_costs,
    fi.total_scrap_event_cost_impact,
    (fi.total_batch_costs + fi.total_scrap_event_cost_impact) AS overall_financial_impact
FROM BatchInfo bi
LEFT JOIN ProcessStepsDetails psd ON bi.batch_id = psd.batch_id
LEFT JOIN DeviationsSummary ds_step ON psd.batch_id = ds_step.batch_id AND psd.equipment_id = ds_step.equipment_id
LEFT JOIN DeviationsSummary ds_batch ON bi.batch_id = ds_batch.batch_id AND ds_batch.equipment_id IS NULL
LEFT JOIN OOSSummary oss ON bi.batch_id = oss.batch_id
LEFT JOIN FinancialImpact fi ON bi.batch_id = fi.batch_id
ORDER BY psd.step_number;

LEFT JOIN
    employee AS sup ON tb.supervisor_id = sup.employee_id
LEFT JOIN
    employee AS rel ON tb.released_by = rel.employee_id
LEFT JOIN
    batch_comment AS bc ON tb.batch_id = bc.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    employee AS comm_by ON bc.commented_by = comm_by.employee_id
LEFT JOIN
    batch_cost AS bco ON tb.batch_id = bco.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    cost_center AS cc ON bco.cost_center_id = cc.cost_center_id
LEFT JOIN
    batch_hold AS bh ON tb.batch_id = bh.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    employee AS h_rel ON bh.released_by = h_rel.employee_id
LEFT JOIN
    batch_record_entry AS bre ON tb.batch_id = bre.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    document AS d ON bre.document_id = d.document_id
LEFT JOIN
    employee AS e_ent_by ON bre.entered_by = e_ent_by.employee_id
LEFT JOIN
    employee AS e_ver_by ON bre.verified_by = e_ver_by.employee_id
LEFT JOIN
    employee AS doc_auth ON d.author_id = doc_auth.employee_id
LEFT JOIN
    department AS doc_dept ON d.department_id = doc_dept.department_id
LEFT JOIN
    batch_rework AS brw ON tb.batch_id = brw.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    employee AS rw_app_by ON brw.approved_by = rw_app_by.employee_id
LEFT JOIN
    employee AS rw_perf_by ON brw.performed_by = rw_perf_by.employee_id
LEFT JOIN
    batch_step_execution AS bse ON tb.batch_id = bse.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    equipment AS eq_step ON bse.equipment_id = eq_step.equipment_id
LEFT JOIN
    employee AS s_perf_by ON bse.performed_by = s_perf_by.employee_id
LEFT JOIN
    employee AS s_ver_by ON bse.verified_by = s_ver_by.employee_id
LEFT JOIN
    batch_yield AS byd ON tb.batch_id = byd.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    employee AS y_meas_by ON byd.measured_by = y_meas_by.employee_id
LEFT JOIN
    scrap_event AS se ON tb.batch_id = se.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    employee AS sc_rep_by ON se.reported_by = sc_rep_by.employee_id
LEFT JOIN
    equipment AS eq_scrap ON se.equipment_id = eq_scrap.equipment_id
LEFT JOIN
    deviation AS dev_direct ON tb.batch_id = dev_direct.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    employee AS dev_direct_rep_by ON dev_direct.reported_by = dev_direct_rep_by.employee_id
LEFT JOIN
    employee AS dev_direct_cls_by ON dev_direct.closed_by = dev_direct_cls_by.employee_id
LEFT JOIN
    equipment AS eq_dev_direct ON dev_direct.equipment_id = eq_dev_direct.equipment_id
LEFT JOIN
    deviation_affected_batch AS dab ON tb.batch_id = dab.batch_id
LEFT JOIN
    deviation AS dev_affected ON dab.deviation_id = dev_affected.deviation_id
LEFT JOIN
    employee AS dev_affected_rep_by ON dev_affected.reported_by = dev_affected_rep_by.employee_id
LEFT JOIN

LEFT JOIN
    equipment AS eq_dev_affected ON dev_affected.equipment_id = eq_dev_affected.equipment_id
LEFT JOIN
    equipment_sensor AS es ON eq_step.equipment_id = es.equipment_id
LEFT JOIN
    batch_parameter_reading AS bpr ON bse.execution_id = bpr.execution_id
LEFT JOIN
    employee AS pr_rec_by ON bpr.recorded_by = pr_rec_by.employee_id
LIMIT 1000

question: Are any material lots expiring in the next 6 months?
sql:
SELECT
  ml.lot_id,
  ml.lot_number,
  ml.expiry_date,
  ml.quantity_available
FROM material_lot AS ml
WHERE
  ml.expiry_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '6 months'
ORDER BY
  ml.expiry_date
LIMIT 1000

question: What percentage of batches were rejected?
sql:
WITH BatchCounts AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(b.batch_id) AS total_batches,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN b.status = 'rejected' THEN b.batch_id ELSE NULL END) AS rejected_batches
  FROM batch AS b
)
SELECT
  (bc.rejected_batches * 100.0) / bc.total_batches AS percentage_batches_rejected
FROM BatchCounts AS bc
LIMIT 1000

  se.corrective_action

question: Which site has the best batch approval rate?
sql:
WITH SiteBatchStats AS (
  SELECT
    s.site_id,
    s.name AS site_name,
    COUNT(b.batch_id) AS total_batches,
    COUNT(b.batch_id) FILTER (WHERE b.status = 'approved') AS approved_batches
  FROM batch AS b
  JOIN site AS s
    ON b.site_id = s.site_id
  GROUP BY
    s.site_id,
    s.name
), SiteApprovalRates AS (
  SELECT
    site_name,
    (CAST(approved_batches AS NUMERIC) / total_batches) * 100 AS approval_rate_pct
  FROM SiteBatchStats
  WHERE
    total_batches > 0
)
SELECT
  site_name,
  approval_rate_pct
FROM SiteApprovalRates
ORDER BY
  approval_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 1;
